findings.title: Mixed tab/space indentation on new lines
findings.disposition: Tabs introduced in the changed contract and validator lines were normalized to spaces. JSON, validator syntax, focused model tests, and git diff --check were rerun after the fix.

findings.title: Fixture matches_layout_record flag was not cross-checked
findings.disposition: The model test and RP00 validator now assert that the identifier fixture field is present in the S01 layout required_packet_fields, so matches_layout_record is backed by executable coverage.

findings.title: Lifecycle status duplicates contract status
findings.disposition: The duplicated status mirrors sibling control-plane policy constants and remains synchronized by validator checks against contract status.

findings.title: S02 evidence artifacts must exist before production_ready
findings.disposition: Evidence artifacts are materialized in the S02 evidence root and verified by npm run rp00:control-plane:validate.

findings.title: S01 closeout evidence must remain intact
findings.disposition: S01 remains in requiredClosedSubphases and is enforced by RP00 validation.

findings.title: Format gate conditional on indentation consistency
findings.disposition: The indentation P2 was fixed before production_ready promotion.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S02 identifier-only slice with no P0/P1, no states.js or entity registry mutation, no real data, no product-state writes, tenant scope deferred to RP00.P01.M08.S03, and handoff to S03. P2 indentation was fixed; P3-1 was fixed with executable layout-field cross-checks; P3-2 was accepted as an existing sibling pattern; closeout blockers are closed by evidence.
